inputs.name: in
inputs.label: Trigger
inputs.description: Activates this node when a value arrives.

inputs.name: path
inputs.label: File Path
inputs.description: Overrides the configured file path at runtime.

outputs.name: out
outputs.label: File Content
outputs.description: Full text content of the file.

outputs.name: path
outputs.label: Resolved Path

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: Error
outputs.description: Error message if the file could not be read.
